all_caps.name: rls_dynamic_incomplete
all_caps.reason: If RLS dynamic cross-tenant proof is incomplete, max overall score is 8.0.

all_caps.name: whole_app_50k_fixture_insufficient
all_caps.reason: If the synthetic 50k fixture is insufficient, max overall score is 8.4 and this is not a p95 failure.

all_caps.name: whole_app_50k_missing
all_caps.reason: If whole-app 50k live EXPLAIN/p95 is missing, max overall score is 8.4.

all_caps.name: ai_live_transcripts_missing
all_caps.reason: If AI live transcripts are missing, AI score is capped at 7.5 and overall score is capped by evidence.

all_caps.name: media_100k_missing
all_caps.reason: If media 100k proof is missing, storage/security score is capped at 8.0.

all_caps.name: release_verify_missing
all_caps.reason: If release:verify is missing, max overall score is 8.2.

all_caps.name: full_jest_missing
all_caps.reason: If full Jest is missing, max overall score is 8.0.
